property.name: fsOrderDetails
property.description: API name of the fieldset on PC_Order object which will be used in Order Details. If left blank, then PC_OrderDetails fieldset will be considered.
property.label: Order Details Fieldset

property.name: fsProduct
property.description: API name of the fieldset on Product object which will be used in Product Select List. If left blank, then PC_Product fieldset will be considered.
property.label: Product Selection Fieldset

property.name: fsOrderItem
property.description: API name of the fieldset on PC_OrderItem object which will be used in Order Item Details. If left blank, then PC_OrderItems fieldset will be considered.
property.label: Order Item Fieldset

property.name: fsOrderShipment
property.description: API name of the fieldset on PC_Order object which will be used in Order Shipment Details. If left blank, then PC_OrderShipment fieldset will be considered.
property.label: Order Shipment Fieldset

property.name: showAllProduct
property.description: Show Engagement Program Product or All Products. It will show only first 1000 records
property.label: Show all product
